hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const p=(j.tool_input&&(j.tool_input.file_path||j.tool_input.path))||'';if(/(^|\/)\.env($|\.|\/)|node_modules|(^|\/)\.expo(\/|$)|app-example/.test(p)){process.stderr.write('Blocked: protected path -> '+p+' (.env, node_modules, .expo and app-example are off-limits)');process.exit(2)}}catch(e){}})"
npm run lint 2>&1 | tail -5 && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -5
